title: andryala rothia var. pinnatifida
intro: Andryala rothia var. pinnatifida is a subspecies of Andryala rothia, a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is a low-growing, perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal and health-promoting properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Andryala rothia var. pinnatifida is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and used in herbal supplements, to harness its medicinal benefits.
